Verasity is an open ledger ecosystem bringing trust and transparency to digital advertising and payments.

VeraWallet

VeraWallet is an insured, simple and secure wallet for your assets. Industry-leading security and cold storage keeps your funds safe, while our staking ecosystem rewards VeraWallet users.

Learn More

VeraViews

VeraViews is an open ledger advertising ecosystem built around Verasity's patented 'Proof of View' (PoV) fraud identification technology.
